shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Default card and surface shadow. Barely visible — tonal layering does the real work.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all exit and state transitions. Quieter than built-in ease-out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled ink background, white text. The single call-to-action on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--fg); background: var(--fg); color: var(--bg-elevated); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms var(--ease-out), background-color 160ms var(--ease-out); will-change: transform; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--bg), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none !important; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 4%, var(--bg-elevated)); } }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Paper background, ink border, ink text. Default variant for non-primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-elevated); color: var(--fg); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms var(--ease-out), background-color 160ms var(--ease-out), border-color 160ms var(--ease-out); will-change: transform; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--bg), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 50%, transparent); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-secondary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 4%, var(--bg-elevated)); } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background, no border. For inline secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: var(--fg); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms var(--ease-out), background-color 160ms var(--ease-out); will-change: transform; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--bg), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 50%, transparent); } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 4%, var(--bg-elevated)); } }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Paper background, 1px Ledge border, 6px radius. Compact 36px height.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-elevated); outline: none; transition: border-color 160ms var(--ease-out), box-shadow 160ms var(--ease-out); width: 100%; font: inherit; color: inherit; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--fg) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--fg) 18%, transparent) !important; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Paper background, 14px radius, 1px Ledge border, minimal shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--bg-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Full pill (999px radius), 22px height, 12px font. Neutral tone shown.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); color: var(--fg-muted); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge[data-tone="ok"] { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--ok) 12%, transparent); color: var(--ok); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--ok) 30%, transparent); } .ds-badge[data-tone="warn"] { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--warn) 12%, transparent); color: var(--warn); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--warn) 30%, transparent); } .ds-badge[data-tone="danger"] { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--danger) 12%, transparent); color: var(--danger); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--danger) 30%, transparent); }

narrative.overview:
Clean, fast, and candid — this is a desk that faces the student, not the institution. No corporate gloss, no decorative friction, no waiting for things that don't matter. Every screen has one job, every interaction gives tactile feedback, and the page gets out of the way the moment the user knows what to do.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS visual language: no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric templates, no thick colored side stripes, no repeating decorative backgrounds. The palette is deliberately tight — a monochromatic stone scale with three semantic signal colors. The accent IS the foreground.
keyCharacteristics: Monochromatic, high-contrast palette — no brand color as accent
Flat-ish surfaces with tonal elevation, not shadow depth
No CSS framework — every primitive hand-rolled and intentional

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: The accent is the foreground color. It does not appear as a separate brand hue.

rules.name: The System Font Rule
rules.body: No custom typeface is loaded. The system UI stack is fast, native-feeling.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Most surfaces have no shadow. Depth is conveyed by background color change.

dos: Use ink (--fg) as the only emphasis color. Let weight, size, and position do the work.
Use color-mix(in oklab, ... alpha) for all tinted variants.
Use tonal elevation instead of shadows for surface hierarchy.
Gate hover effects behind @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine).
Honor prefers-reduced-motion with shorter durations and disabled parallax.
donts: Add a separate brand accent color.
Use repeated card grids with identical icon + heading + body structure.
Use the small uppercase tracked 'eyebrow' above every section.
Use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) unless the steps are an actual sequence.
Add decorative SVG illustrations, especially sketchy or hand-drawn ones.
Use repeating-linear-gradient stripe backgrounds or two-axis CSS grid overlays.
Pair border: 1px solid with box-shadow blur ≥ 16px on the same element.
